name: Slowly Deviled Beef
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Lean stew beef, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in an electric slow cooker.
2. Stir to mix the ingredients.
3. Cover and cook for about 10 hours on low, or 4 1/2 to 5 hours on high.
4. Do not peek or stir until near the end of cooking time.
- Lifting the cooker lid will increase cooking time significantly.
5. Serve beef with hot cooked noodles or rice.
6. Makes 6 servings
Note: This dish can also be cooked in a covered 2-quart casserole for 2 to 2 1/2 hours at 325°F oven temperature.
